proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Napier Accommodation Arrears

**Status:** No sources, artifacts, or memory entries found.

**Next Step:** Upload and index source documents (e.g., tenancy agreement, arrears ledger, correspondence) to enable analysis.

**Authorities Available:**
- Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016, schedule 1 (excludes university-provided student accommodation from PRT regime)
- Housing (Scotland) Act 1988, section 12 and schedule 4 (assured tenancy exclusions)
- Housing (Scotland) Act 2001, section 7 (Scottish Ministers may prescribe occupancy terms)
- Equality Act 2010, sections 20, 21, 91 (reasonable adjustments, discrimination in education)
- Scottish Public Services Ombudsman Act 2002 (complaint handling jurisdiction)

**Recommendation:** Proceed with source collection task.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map for Napier Accommodation Arrears

proposed_tasks.instructions: Locate and upload all available source documents related to Napier University accommodation arrears. Expected documents include: tenancy or occupancy agreement, arrears ledger or statement, correspondence between the university and the student, any internal policies on accommodation fees, and any evidence of disability or reasonable adjustment requests. After upload, run OCR if needed and index the sources for the matter napier-accommodation-arrears.
proposed_tasks.title: Upload and index source documents for Napier accommodation arrears
